html:
Cucumber block salad

Ingredients

  • 500 ml finely grated cucumber, drained
    • 1 small onion, grated
    • 1 packet lemon jelly
    • 250 ml boiling water
    • 125ml cream cheese
    • 125 ml mayo
    • Salt and pepper

Method

  1. Make up the jelly with the boiling water
    2. Stir the cream cheese and mayo into the jelly
    3. Add the cucumber, onion, salt and pepper
    4. Pour into a square 'brownie' glass dish that has been rinsed with ice water
    5. Place in the fridge to set
    6. Serve cut into blocks
